# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for our application that needs to write logs and temporary files. Copy application files and set up directories for logs and cache. The container needs write permissions to these directories. Keep permissions flexible for ease of development and debugging.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:14-alpine

# Set the working directory to /app
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the package.json file to the current directory
COPY package*.json ./

# Install all the dependencies from the package.json file
RUN npm install

# Copy all files from the src folder to the /app directory
COPY src/ ./src/

# Set the permissions for logs and cache directories
RUN chmod -R a+w /app/logs
RUN chmod -R a+w /app/cache

# Expose the port that our application will use
EXPOSE 3000

# Run the application when the container starts
CMD ["npm", "start"]
